ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session was created */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the session in seconds */,
  "end_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session ended */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_details" (
  "session_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session detail entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated session */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site (module) being visited */,
  "time_spent" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the user finished interacting with the site */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., click, hover, scroll) */,
  "interaction_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the interaction */,
  "site_section" TEXT /* Specific section of the site visited by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_details_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the user (foreign key referencing the user_roles table) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the training module or course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training module */,
  "site_category" TEXT /* Category of the training module (e.g., beginner, advanced) */,
  "site_tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags or keywords for the training module */,
  "site_author" TEXT /* Author or creator of the training module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., student, instructor) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role's responsibilities and permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session associated with the activity */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, complete, interact) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the activity */,
  "activity_result" TEXT /* Outcome of the activity (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
